name: Dilly Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 heads dill or 1 tsp. dill seed per jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Pack beans lengthwise into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space.
2. Add 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper, 1 clove garlic, and 1 head of dill to each pint jar.
3. Combine remaining ingredients (water, vinegar, and salt) in a large pot and bring to a boil.
4. Pour the boiling liquid over the beans, maintaining 1/4 inch head space in each jar.
5. Adjust lids and process jars for 10 minutes in boiling water.
Yield: 4 pints.
